response.justification: Over 15 years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React work at multiple companies, current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development directly matching the role's AI agent requirement, and a deep testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks). Docker/Kubernetes and AWS experience cover the infrastructure needs. Main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure and some career time spent in niche ecosystems (DLang), but the breadth and polyglot track record suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across product companies
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matches a rare role requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored testing libraries and courses
concerns: No Kotlin and only limited Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
Significant portion of deep-systems experience in DLang, a niche ecosystem
